purpose: Ensure original visual work has content-specific art direction and a real quality gate without weakening the three source capabilities.

cases.prompt: 为‘工作流别靠记忆’做一张封面，要求高级、不要模板感。
cases.expect: cover skill records a content-specific art direction, evaluates thumbnail, text, anchor and trust, then repairs only failed dimensions before claiming QA

cases.prompt: 为‘把碎片信息变成选题’做一张小黑正文图，要有原创感。
cases.expect: xiaohei skill uses an article-specific metaphor and evaluates action, linework craft, whitespace, annotations and originality rather than accepting a generic office scene

cases.prompt: 把内容生产闭环做成一张高质量材质解释图。
cases.expect: material skill verifies readable structure, accurate labels, material craft and editorial hierarchy instead of returning a generic 3D icon board
